findings.title: Layer violation: domain → infrastructure
findings.description: File in 'domain' layer imports from 'infrastructure' layer. Dependencies should flow inward (presentation → application → domain ← infrastructure).
findings.recommendation: Invert the dependency using an interface in the domain layer. Create a UserRepository interface in domain and implement it in infrastructure.

findings.title: Multiple packages with prefix 'eslint'
findings.description: Found 4 packages starting with 'eslint': eslint, eslint-config-prettier, eslint-plugin-angular, eslint-plugin-unused-imports. Check for redundant dependencies.
findings.recommendation: Verify whether all ESLint plugins are actively used in the configuration.
